path.aria-label: The constraint Neurons as specialized eukaryotic cells

g.aria-label: Aim 1: Computational Design Space Morphology as predictive null model for Input/Output Capacity and synaptic allocation
Aim 2: Cell-type-specific plasticity rules Structure constraints learning regime, synaptic budgets, and instructive signal access
Aim 3: Energetic limits and vulnerability Where in the design space do neurons fail? Is this predictive of neurodegeneration?
